overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic neon-lit urban downtown on a clear sunny day. The scene features towering glass skyscrapers, elevated highways, holographic advertisements, and transitions from open sidewalks to covered underpasses with graffiti-covered walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with elevated highway overhead

events.description: purple sports car drives past on the street to the right
silver sedan passes through the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk approaching an urban intersection with palm trees

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with support columns spanning the street
dark green building with horizontal windows and red corporate signage
tall buildings covered with multiple glowing holographic billboards
concrete pedestrian walkway with distinctive red painted stripe
row of palm trees lining the center median of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny downtown sidewalk with a distinctive red painted stripe. The player walks forward beneath an elevated highway structure, passing neon-covered skyscrapers and palm trees. Vehicles occasionally pass on the street to the right as the camera approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with security fencing

events.description: entering the covered area under the overpass with metal security fencing on the left
slight turn to the right while continuing forward along the fenced corridor

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass alongside a tall metal security fence on the left

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall metal security fence with horizontal slats blocking access to the left
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered walkway beneath the elevated highway, where the environment becomes more enclosed. A tall metal security fence runs along the left side, and the right side opens to the street where futuristic vehicles pass by. The lighting shifts to a mix of shadow and dappled sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered underpass corridor with concrete support pillars

events.description: camera pans left to examine detailed graffiti mural reading GET THE RUSH on the wall
moving from deep shadow into a patch of direct sunlight streaming under the overpass

agents.ego_description: slowing to examine the graffiti art on the left wall while continuing forward through the underpass

entered.detail: colorful painted portrait with text reading GET THE RUSH and various tags
massive cylindrical columns supporting the overhead highway structure

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the underpass, the player examines a large graffiti mural on the left wall featuring a portrait and the text GET THE RUSH. The corridor is flanked by massive concrete support pillars, and the ground shows scattered debris. The environment remains sheltered under the elevated highway with dramatic light and shadow patterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with highway off-ramp and industrial buildings

events.description: exiting the covered underpass into open sunlight at the intersection area
crossing the street at the intersection while navigating around traffic bollards

agents.ego_description: crossing the asphalt street at the intersection, moving toward the orange commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking across the intersection in the background

entered.detail: low-rise red building with exposed industrial piping and machinery
curved concrete ramp descending from the elevated highway to street level
yellow and black striped posts lining the crosswalk and sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the underpass into bright sunlight at a busy intersection. A red industrial building with exposed machinery stands on the left, while a highway off-ramp curves down ahead. The player crosses the street, navigating around striped traffic bollards, with the elevated highway now visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with restaurant and palm trees

events.description: turning right to face the CALIENTE restaurant building across the intersection

agents.ego_description: pausing to look at the orange CALIENTE restaurant building while standing at the intersection edge

entered.detail: orange building with large yellow CALIENTE neon signage and palm trees in front
tall curved glass tower with reflective facade rising behind the restaurant

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the CALIENTE restaurant, an orange building with prominent yellow neon signage, situated at the intersection. Palm trees line the street in front of the restaurant, and a massive curved glass skyscraper rises in the background. The player stands at the crosswalk, observing the vibrant commercial area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, open downtown sidewalk into a sheltered urban underpass before emerging back into a vibrant commercial intersection. It begins on a sunny walkway marked by a red stripe, moving past neon skyscrapers and palm trees toward the shadow of an elevated highway. As the camera enters the covered walkway, the environment becomes enclosed by a metal security fence and massive concrete pillars, shifting the lighting to a mix of dappled sunlight and deep shadows that highlight a large graffiti mural. The scene then opens back into brilliant sunlight as the player exits the underpass, navigating past a red industrial building and striped traffic bollards. Finally, the movement concludes at a busy crosswalk facing the orange Caliente restaurant and its yellow neon signage, with a massive curved glass skyscraper looming in the background.
